name: Can I create a sale for products I haven't created yet?
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can handle sales for new or uncataloged items in Retail Express through flexible product creation options, helping your retail operators complete transactions even when products aren't pre-entered in the system. This capability ensures you can process sales immediately for new arrivals or one-off items, which helps prevent lost sales while maintaining transaction accuracy."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Setting up on-the-fly product handling enables your retail operations to remain agile when dealing with unexpected inventory, helping optimize sales capture while ensuring proper record-keeping. This helps retail businesses maintain flexibility in handling diverse product scenarios while keeping accurate sales and inventory data."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This article details the process for handling sales of for new Products that have not yet been created in Back Office e.g. selling products straight from your supplier catalogue."}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "Typically these sales are referred to as "Special Orders", however this shouldn't be confused with the Retail Express dedicated "}, {"text": "Special orders"}, {"text": " feature for stock sourced directly sourced for the supplier (this process requires products to be created in Back Office first)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The process involves:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Creating a "Miscellaneous" product in Back Office"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Selling the product at POS, allowing you to capture the customer and Product details"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Creating the new product in Back Office, including Product details and pricing (stock on hand value will be zero)"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Ordering the product from your Supplier"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the original sale to reflect the correct new Product"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This feature is not compatible with web store integrations, as the product will exist as a single product online (not customisable)."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Related: ", "bold": true}, {"text": "You can create Special Orders for products sourced directly from the Supplier using the "}, {"text": "Special Orders"}, {"text": "; however please note this process requires the products to exist in Back Office first."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/633-can-i-create-a-sale-for-products-i-havent-created-yet#collapseOne", "children": [{"text": "Create a miscellaneous Special Order Product (only required for initial setup) "}]}], "data-id": "create-a-miscellaneous-special-order-product-only-required-for-initial-setup"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The creation of a Miscellaneous Product is only required once during the initial setup. The Miscellaneous Product is simply used as a placeholder to allow you to create the special order sale at POS and gather the customer and product information."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "This single Product is designed to be used in the future for all orders without existing products. You don't need to create a new Miscellaneous Product each time a similar style sale is processed."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create a new miscellaneous Product, and enter the basic information as below:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Field", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Short Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This should be Miscellaneous Product or Special Order so that it is easy to search for at POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Supplier SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This should be MISC (or something similar) to ensure it is easy to search for POS"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Type"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set this field to any Product Type, however using something like MISC allows you to exclude this Product Type (and Product) from reporting if required."}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Supplier"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Set this field to any supplier, however using something like MISC allows you to exclude this Product from reporting if required."}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-aa119909"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For detailed information on creating a Product, please see:"}, {"text": "How to create a Product manually"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/633-can-i-create-a-sale-for-products-i-havent-created-yet#collapseTwo", "children": [{"text": "Step 1 - Create a Special Order sale at POS "}]}], "data-id": "step-1-create-a-special-order-sale-at-pos"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To create the sale in POS, you'll need to use the newly added Miscellaneous product. This allows you to process the sale immediately, reducing the risk of losing the customer."}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a sale in POS"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Add the Miscellaneous product to the sale."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Double click the product to access the Edit Product screen"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "If using a touchscreen laptop or tablet you will need to press and hold"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Update the description with the relevant details of the order e.g. name of the product from the Supplier"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click Done"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click into the Price field and enter the Special Order price"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The Products tab will now reflect the edited Product description and price"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Customer tab and enter the customer details"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Go to the Fulfilment tab and set the Fulfilment Method to Layby"}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "by setting the Fulfilment Method to Layby you ensure the ability to update the Product on the sale at a later time."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Finalise the sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Provide the customer a receipt (this will display the product details entered  in step 4 for the Miscellaneous product with the correct information)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/633-can-i-create-a-sale-for-products-i-havent-created-yet#collapseThree", "children": [{"text": "Step 2 - Create the new Product in Back Office"}]}], "data-id": "step-2-create-the-new-product-in-back-office"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Create the special order Product in Back Office and order it from your Supplier."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For detailed information on creating a Product, please see:"}, {"text": "How to create a Product manually"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "You may wish to wait until you've actually receipted the special order Product before editing the sale to ensure the COGS, retail price and SOH information is correct."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/633-can-i-create-a-sale-for-products-i-havent-created-yet#collapseFour", "children": [{"text": "Step 3 - Process a Return on the original Sale "}]}], "data-id": "step-3-process-a-return-on-the-original-sale"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once the special order Product is available, you can process a credit/return of the original invoice number. This allows you to remove the MISC Special Order Product and add the actual Product."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Process a return / credit using the normal procedure.", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For more information on returns please see:"}, {"text": "How do I refund / return a product at POS?"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enter the "}, {"text": "Layby Qty", "bold": true}, {"text": " to cancel"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Next", "bold": true}, {"text": " and proceed with creating the Refund"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The return will display on the screen. The original Special Order product will have a line crossed through it to indicate the cancellation/refund."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "you can choose to hide refunded (zero item) Products from the customers invoice and receipt, however they will continue to display on your POS screen; refer to the "}, {"text": "Invoice & Receipt"}, {"text": " settings option "Show zero quantity order lines on Invoices and Tax Receipts" for more information."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Now add the new true Product to the sale."}, {"text": "

"}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "Remember to update the Fulfilment Method if required"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Finalise and Update the sale to complete."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Special Orders Overview"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a Product manually"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "How do I return / refund or exchange a Product at POS?"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Return Reason Setup"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
